text:
Once upon a time, there was a farm with chickens. There were ducks. They were all ducks.

One day, a fox came along. He saw the chickens scratchin' insects. He thought they looked tasty. So, he hid a little way off.

The fox watched. He could wait. He saw one chicken poke its head out.

"Oh no!" he thought. "What should I eat?"

He chased after it. The chicken ran. It jumped in a lake. Fox jumped too.

He splashed water everywhere.

"Blub! Blub!" He opened his eyes. Where was he? There were fishes.

He couldn't swim. He jumped landwards.

Finally, he found some berries.

"You okay?" asks a squirrel.

"They're yum!"

The squirrel agreed.

Now he learned always beware ponds. Fox eats fish now.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
